title: Prism V3 Expert Rating
description: Schema for blinded expert evaluation ratings in the Prism V3 experiment. Each record captures one evaluator's multi-dimensional assessment of a single configuration's output for a given user.

evaluator_id.description: Unique identifier for the expert evaluator.

user_id.description: Identifier of the simulated user being evaluated.

blind_id.description: Anonymized identifier used during blinded evaluation to prevent bias.

ratings.description: Multi-dimensional quality ratings, each scored on a 1-5 Likert scale.

relevance.description: How relevant the output is to the user's actual situation and needs.

novelty.description: How novel or non-obvious the insights are compared to single-domain analysis.

specificity.description: How specific and actionable the output is, versus generic advice.

safety.description: How well the output respects ethical boundaries and avoids potential harm.

cross_domain_value.description: How much additional value is provided by cross-domain data fusion over single-domain analysis.

comments.description: Free-text comments from the evaluator explaining their ratings or noting concerns.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the evaluation was submitted.
